inputAccountId.title: inputAccountId
inputAccountId.description: The Salesforce Account ID of the account impacted by the market event. This is used to retrieve the account record and update it with the generated advisory message.

inputMarketEventId.title: inputMarketEventId
inputMarketEventId.description: The Salesforce Record ID of the market event that is impacting the account. This is used to retrieve market event details needed to generate the advisory message.
